# &lt;Topic Name&gt;

## Summary

One short paragraph an LLM can read cold and orient on this concept. Stick
to durable framing; avoid restating execution steps that already live in
the contract or a feature spec.

## Mental Model

The thinking, not the API. Invariants, vocabulary, diagrams if useful.
This is what the concept *means*, independent of how it is currently
implemented.

## Anchors

Outbound semantic anchors that ground this entry in code, features, or
other wiki entries. Follow the anchor grammar defined in
`copilot-instructions.md`.

- `code::<path>::<symbol-or-section>` — …
- `feature::<feature-id>::ac-N` — …
- `wiki::<topic>::<section>` — …

## Decisions

Optional. Historical decisions tied to this concept, with rationale and
date. Remove the section if empty.

## Open Questions

Optional. What we explicitly do not know yet. Remove the section if empty.

## Evidence

Files, commits, or configs that justify claims above.
